name: EdgeChamfer
summary: The EdgeChamfer class defines how the part edge is chamfered.

constructors.name: EdgeChamfer
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the EdgeChamfer class with empty attributes.

constructors.name: EdgeChamfer
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the EdgeChamfer class.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares Identifiers of model objects.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the edge chamfer instance with the given ID from the model database.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Check if Identifiers of model objects are same.

methods.name: GetAllReportProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

methods.summary: Returns the coordinate system for the given model object.

methods.summary: Gets custom object type name from an existing object.

methods.summary: Retrieves the phase of the model object (the phase number, the phase name, the phase comment and whether the phase is the current one or not).

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the edge chamfer into the model database. All the attributes must be set.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the existing edge chamfer in the model database to match the current one.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an edge chamfer from the model database. The edge chamfer ID must be set.

methods.name: SetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Sets a custom object type name for an existing object.

methods.name: SetDynamicStringProperty
methods.summary: Sets a dynamic string property for the model object.

methods.name: SetLabel
methods.summary: Sets a label for an object when a new instance is created, this method must be called before Insert. The label is used in plug-ins for identifying the changed object in modification.

methods.name: SetPhase
methods.summary: Sets the phase of the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperties
methods.summary: Sets multiple properties for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the model object.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the model object.

properties.name: Chamfer
properties.summary: The chamfer values for the EdgeChamfer.

properties.name: Father
properties.summary: The father object of the boolean operation; the model object instance to operate on.

properties.name: FirstBevelDimension
properties.summary: The bevel dimension if the first end is bevelled.

properties.name: FirstChamferEndType
properties.summary: The ChamferEndTypeEnum of the first end.

properties.name: FirstEnd
properties.summary: The start point of the EdgeChamfer.

properties.name: IsUpToDate
properties.summary: Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.

properties.name: ModificationTime
properties.summary: Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the EdgeChamfer instance.

properties.name: SecondBevelDimension
properties.summary: The bevel dimension if the second end is bevelled.

properties.name: SecondChamferEndType
properties.summary: The ChamferEndTypeEnum of the second end.

properties.name: SecondEnd
properties.summary: The end point of the EdgeChamfer.
